channel.title: Nix on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Nix on Pi Stack

item.title: Attic vs Harmonia vs niks3: Best Self-Hosted Nix Binary Cache 2026
item.description: If you are using the Nix package manager across multiple machines, a local binary cache eliminates redundant builds and dramatically speeds up deployments. Instead of every machine compiling the same package from source, you build once, push to your cache server, and all other machines download the pre-built binary.
